info.name: ForAdventure AssetTag API
info.description:
Test collection for AssetTagController endpoints

Callout 01 Local Information

- BaseURL: [http://localhost:5034/api/](http://localhost:5034/api/)
    
- Port: 5034
    

Callout 02 Endpoint Header

- Content-Type: application/json
    

StartFragment1. {baseurl}/MakeAssetTag  
2\. {baseurl}/AddPlanLogisticsEndFragment
